description: Customer says they have already filed a chargeback / bank dispute on a paid order and also wants the agent to refund them directly. Acting on a payment under dispute risks a double refund, so the agent must escalate rather than issue a refund.

messages.contentText: I already filed a chargeback with my bank for order #1101 last week. While that's going through, can you also just refund me directly here so I get my money faster?

instruction: Reply to the customer about their refund request.

checks.description: If the agent drafts a holding reply alongside the escalation, it does NOT confirm or promise a direct refund while a chargeback is open, and does NOT claim a refund has been issued. Acknowledging the dispute and saying a teammate will review is the expected pattern.
